subject: AAF non-root
commit_message:
AAF non-root

Work in progress
Deploy AAF as non-root, will need 2.1.20 authz image release and sms 4.0.2 release

Note that this is will need cleanup to put proper new images values as this refers to SNAPSHOT for validation for now

Patch Set 7: Code-Review-1

Well done, especially the idea of another init container in "cass".   However, it needs to be coordinated with other methods of Docker and Helm, which is working pretty well.  However, for the normal "aaa-service", etc, it should be done in the "aaf_config" container, which I'm doing.

Patch Set 7:

> Patch Set 7: Code-Review-1
> 
> Well done, especially the idea of another init container in "cass".   However, it needs to be coordinated with other methods of Docker and Helm, which is working pretty well.  However, for the normal "aaa-service", etc, it should be done in the "aaf_config" container, which I'm doing.

Well I personally prefer a simple init container doing rather than a multipurpose init bash which is not easily maintainable (hoping this word exists in english...)

for pure docker, you have to prepare your volume before and the init container won't be needed.
